meta.income_definition: Realistic monthly income range after ~6 months of consistent part-time effort, net of platform fees, before Croatian tax/contributions.
meta.scoring_formula: total = 0.40*income_score + 0.30*ease_score + 0.15*automation_score + 0.15*lowrisk_score; income_score = 10*log10(income_mid)/log10(20000) capped to [0,10]; ease_score = mean(skill_component, speed_component, cost_component) where skill_component=(5-skill)/4*10, speed_component=10-(days_to_first_eur/90*10) capped, cost_component=10-(upfront_cost/500*10) capped; automation_score = automation_pct/10; lowrisk_score = (5-risk)/4*10
meta.skill_scale: 1 = anyone with Claude Code and patience; 3 = comfortable with code/Claude Code output review; 5 = specialist
meta.risk_scale: 1 = almost guaranteed some income; 5 = lottery-like or ToS/legal/capital risk

opportunities.name: Freelance automation & scripting gigs (Upwork/Fiverr/Freelancer)
opportunities.description: Sell small Python/web automations, scrapers, data cleaning, Excel/API glue. Claude Code writes 80% of the code; you handle clients and QA. Median Upwork rate for Python/scraping is ~$30/hr (range $20-40, top freelancers $50-100+). Realistic beginner arc: EUR 300-1,500 in month one, EUR 2,000-5,000/mo by month 3-6.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Upwork/Fiverr fully available; payout via Payoneer or Wise to EUR account. Upwork fee ~10%.
first_steps: Create an Upwork profile around one niche (e.g. 'web scraping & price monitoring')
Use your pokusaj tracker as the portfolio piece
Bid on 10-15 small (<EUR 200) jobs to build reviews

opportunities.name: Etsy/Gumroad digital products factory
opportunities.description: Claude Code + image tooling generates niche planners, templates, maps and wall art; Etsy brings the buyers (95M active buyers vs 7.5M sellers). Realistic: EUR 100-500 in month one, EUR 1,000-3,000/mo after 3-6 months of consistent listing (200+ listings for the upper end). Generic niches are saturated; hyper-specific ones still work. As a geodesist: custom city/terrain map posters are a proven niche.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Etsy supports Croatian sellers with Payoneer payouts; listing fee $0.20 + ~9.5% total fees.
first_steps: Automate a map-poster generator (OSM data + your cartography taste) with Claude Code
List 30-50 hyper-specific designs (Croatian coastal towns, hiking areas)
Reinvest in whichever niche gets favorites/sales

opportunities.name: Websites & tools for local (Croatian) small businesses
opportunities.description: Build simple sites, booking forms, menu pages, and small business automations for local clients who will never use Upwork. Claude Code makes each site a weekend job. EUR 300-800 per site plus optional EUR 10-30/mo maintenance retainers that stack up.
opportunities.croatia_notes: No platform fees; invoice via pausalni obrt. Local trust + no international competition is the edge.
first_steps: Build 2 demo sites (cafe, tradesman) with Claude Code in one weekend
Walk/email local businesses with outdated sites
Offer a fixed price + small monthly hosting/maintenance retainer

opportunities.name: GIS / Earth Engine / QGIS freelancing (Upwork, Fiverr)
opportunities.description: Spatial analysis, land-use mapping, Earth Engine scripts, QGIS automation, map production. Typical advertised rates $20-30/hr, specialized GEE/remote-sensing work $50+. Claude Code writes GEE JavaScript/Python and PyQGIS far faster than most incumbents work, and your geodesy background beats generic devs. Demand spans agriculture, climate risk, urban planning.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Fully remote-friendly category; EU timezone is an asset for European clients.
first_steps: Portfolio: 3 GEE demos (NDVI change, flood mapping, urban growth) built with Claude Code
List on Upwork under Remote Sensing + QGIS categories
Undercut slightly until 5 reviews, then raise to EUR 40-60/hr

opportunities.name: Technical writing & documentation with Claude
opportunities.description: Documentation, tutorials, API references for dev tools; Claude drafts, you verify by actually running the code with Claude Code. Fastest category to first payment (7-14 days on Upwork/Fiverr). Rates $30-60/hr for credible technical writers.
opportunities.croatia_notes: English proficiency required; heavy AI-content competition means verified, runnable examples are the differentiator.
first_steps: Write 2-3 sample tutorials (e.g. 'automate QGIS with Python')
Publish them on dev.to/Medium as portfolio
Pitch dev-tool companies and Upwork writing gigs

opportunities.name: Google Maps Platform / web-map development
opportunities.description: Store locators, delivery-zone maps, interactive tourism/real-estate maps, Leaflet/MapLibre dashboards. Sits between web dev and GIS, so it pays web-dev rates ($30-60/hr) while your geo background removes the usual pain (projections, geocoding quality). Steady demand from agencies that can't do maps.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Croatian tourism sector = constant demand for interactive maps (apartments, marinas, trails).
first_steps: Build 2 demos: tourism map + store locator (MapLibre, free tiles)
Pitch web agencies as their on-call 'map guy'
List a productized 'store locator in 48h' gig on Fiverr

opportunities.name: Sell scrapers & data APIs (Apify Store / RapidAPI)
opportunities.description: Package scrapers as pay-per-result Apify actors or freemium RapidAPI endpoints. Platforms handle billing, hosting, customers; you keep ~80%. Top solo devs earn $10-50k/mo on Apify; a realistic first-year target for a few well-chosen niche actors is EUR 50-500/mo growing with catalog size. Near-perfect fit for your existing scraping skills, and income is ~90% passive after publishing.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Apify pays out from $20 (PayPal) / $100 (bank); RapidAPI takes 20%. Scraping ToS risk varies by target site.
first_steps: Port your Cardmarket/Scryfall pipeline into an Apify actor (pay-per-result)
Publish 3-5 niche actors nobody else offers (Croatian/EU data sources are underserved)
Iterate on whichever gets organic installs

opportunities.name: Drone photogrammetry processing (desk-only, others' data)
opportunities.description: Process other pilots' aerial data into orthomosaics, DEMs, 3D models using WebODM (free) or Metashape - no drone or flying needed, fully remote. US drone-mapping desk rates average $29-48/hr; part-time operators bill EUR 2,000-5,000/mo with 2-3 steady clients. Many small survey/drone firms outsource exactly this. Your geodesy training (datums, GCPs, accuracy reporting) is the differentiator; Claude Code automates the WebODM/GDAL pipelines around it.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Croatian/regional drone operators and surveyors are potential direct clients; WebODM keeps software cost at zero.
first_steps: Set up an automated WebODM pipeline (upload -> processed deliverables) with Claude Code
Process one public dataset into a showcase report with accuracy stats
Pitch drone pilots and survey offices (they hate the desk work)

opportunities.name: TCG price-tracking & arbitrage alert service (paid Discord/newsletter)
opportunities.description: Extend your pokusaj tracker into a subscription product: automated Cardmarket/TCGplayer/eBay price-gap alerts, buyout detection, and precon value tracking, delivered via paid Discord or newsletter at EUR 5-15/mo. Commercial precedents exist (TCGSniper, TCG Price Tracker, SleeveIQ) which proves demand - your edge is EU/Cardmarket depth and Croatian/EU seller data nobody else covers. Pipeline runs itself on GitHub Actions.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Cardmarket ToS prohibits scraping - build on Scryfall/official data where possible and keep scraped extras personal-risk. Stripe/Discord monetization works from Croatia.
first_steps: Add price-gap (Cardmarket EUR vs TCGplayer USD) alerts to the existing pipeline
Post free daily alerts to Reddit/Discord MTG-finance groups for 2 months to build audience
Gate the fast/full alerts behind a EUR 5-10/mo tier

opportunities.name: AI training / RLHF work (Outlier, DataAnnotation, Toloka, Mercor)
opportunities.description: Paid tasks reviewing AI outputs, writing prompts, coding evaluations. Pay: $10-15/hr basic annotation, $20-40/hr coding/STEM tiers, $200+/hr for rare domain experts (Mercor/Scale). Fully flexible hours, work whenever you want. Pay is region-tiered so Croatian rates can be below US rates.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Outlier operates in 61 countries, Toloka 100+, Appen 130+; check Croatia eligibility per project. Using AI to do the tasks violates ToS - this one is real human hours.
first_steps: Sign up on Outlier, DataAnnotation and Mindrift with STEM/geodesy credentials
Pass the coding/math qualification tests (they gate the $20-40/hr tiers)
Track which platform actually feeds you tasks and drop the rest

opportunities.name: AI-automation consulting for SMBs
opportunities.description: Set up Claude/automation workflows for small businesses (document processing, report generation, data pipelines). One practitioner reports $4,200/mo as an AI-automation freelancer; AI consulting has the highest ceiling of service work ($75-150/hr for credible specialists). Requires client-facing confidence more than deep code skills - Claude Code does the building.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Croatian SMBs are early on the AI adoption curve - less competition, but also more education needed per sale. EU AI Act literacy is a selling point.
first_steps: Automate one real workflow for a friendly local business free/cheap as case study
Package 2-3 fixed-price offers (e.g. 'invoice processing bot, EUR 800')
Ask every client for a referral

opportunities.name: Part-time remote EO/GIS contracting (specialist job boards)
opportunities.description: Contract roles via Space-Careers, GEO CAREERS, EGU jobs, Earthworks, the EO-jobs GitHub list. Remote GIS roles post $21-115/hr (analyst average ~$58-120k/yr, remote discount only ~10%). Least flexible option here (set hours/deliverables) but highest reliable rate; part-time contracts exist and EU/Copernicus ecosystem keeps growing.
opportunities.croatia_notes: EU citizenship simplifies contracting with European space-sector firms; Croatian membership in ESA (associate) is expanding national opportunities.
first_steps: Set alerts on space-careers.com, geo-careers.com and the EO-jobs GitHub list
Target contract/part-time listings only
Lead applications with automation skills (Python+Claude Code+GEE) - they're scarce in classic GIS teams

opportunities.name: Dashcam drive-to-earn mapping (Bee Maps/Hivemapper)
opportunities.description: Mount a Bee dashcam, drive, earn HONEY tokens for fresh street imagery. Genuinely passive and geospatial, but earnings for individual contributors are modest and decay 50-70% on repeated routes within months. In a less-mapped country like Croatia fresh-road multipliers help. Hardware via $19/mo subscription. Expect pocket money, not income.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Croatia's coverage is thinner than US/Germany - freshness bonuses likely better; token payout = crypto volatility + tax reporting.
first_steps: Check Hivemapper coverage map for your regular routes
Only buy in if your routes show low coverage
Treat HONEY-EUR conversion as taxable income

opportunities.name: Satellite imagery annotation & geospatial AI training data
opportunities.description: Label satellite/aerial imagery for computer-vision models (buildings, roads, crops, SAR features) on platforms like Labelbox marketplaces, iMerit, and AI-training platforms with geospatial projects. Entry image labeling pays only $12-20/hr, but domain-qualified geospatial/SAR annotation and QA sits higher, and full remote satellite-imagery analyst roles average ~$77k/yr. Completely flexible microtask end; less flexible analyst end.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Region-tiered pay may lower Croatian rates on big platforms; specialized EO projects pay on skill instead.
first_steps: Register on Outlier/Toloka/iMerit flagging GIS+remote-sensing expertise
Also watch Labelbox/Scale for dedicated geospatial projects
Use it as flexible filler income between bigger gigs

opportunities.name: Sell automation templates (n8n/Make/GitHub Actions/Notion)
opportunities.description: Package the automations you build anyway as sellable templates on Gumroad and template marketplaces. Small per-unit prices (EUR 10-50) but zero marginal cost and compounding catalog. Modest but very low effort per additional unit once the first few sell.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Gumroad pays out via Payoneer/bank to Croatia.
first_steps: Turn each client automation into an anonymized template
List on Gumroad + n8n community templates
Bundle related templates into EUR 30-50 packs

opportunities.name: Chrome extension (freemium)
opportunities.description: Build a niche browser extension with Claude Code, monetize via freemium (ExtensionPay/Stripe). Benchmarks: EUR 100-500/mo within 6-12 months at 1,000-5,000 users; EUR 1,000-3,000/mo at 5,000-20,000 users. 2-5% free-to-paid conversion typical. Sellable later at 24-40x monthly revenue.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Chrome Web Store dev fee $5 one-off; Stripe works in Croatia.
first_steps: Pick a niche you know (e.g. Cardmarket power-user tools)
Ship MVP in a weekend with Claude Code
Add ExtensionPay paywall only after ~1,000 users

opportunities.name: Automated niche newsletter (AI-curated)
opportunities.description: A Claude Code pipeline aggregates niche news/RSS/price data, drafts a digest, and ships it via beehiiv/Substack on schedule. Median paid conversion is only 0.62%, so pick a niche with professional willingness to pay (e.g. 'EU TCG market weekly' or 'Adriatic EO/GIS tenders'). Sponsorships beat subscriptions at small scale.
opportunities.croatia_notes: beehiiv/Substack + Stripe work from Croatia.
first_steps: Pick a niche where you already have the data pipeline (TCG prices, geo tenders)
Automate draft generation; spend 20 min/issue on human final edit
Grow free list to ~1,000 before monetizing

opportunities.name: Open-source bounties (Algora)
opportunities.description: Fix GitHub issues with attached bounties ($50-1,500 typical, occasionally $5-10k). Claude Code is built for this, but the market is agent-saturated in 2026: fresh bounties attract 8-158 competing PRs within hours. Treat as occasional topping, not a base income.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Paid via Stripe - works in Croatia.
first_steps: Browse algora.io/bounties for niche repos (less competition than famous ones)
Pick bounties in stacks you know (Python/geo libraries)
Submit within hours of posting or not at all

opportunities.name: Niche geospatial micro-SaaS (automated EO monitoring reports)
opportunities.description: The compounding play: an automated service that turns free Sentinel/Landsat data into subscription reports - vineyard/olive NDVI monitoring for Croatian agriculture, coastal construction change detection, solar-site suitability, illegal-dump detection for municipalities. Google Earth Engine does the compute free for prototyping; Claude Code builds the whole pipeline. Same risk profile as micro-SaaS but with a real moat: few competitors combine EO skills + automation + local market access.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Croatian municipalities, agriculture cooperatives and tourism/real-estate firms are underserved; EU CAP subsidies push farms toward monitoring tools.
first_steps: Prototype one report (e.g. monthly vineyard NDVI PDF) in GEE with Claude Code
Give it free to 3 local farms/co-ops for feedback
Productize at EUR 20-50/mo per monitored parcel bundle

opportunities.name: Cross-market card arbitrage (buy Cardmarket, sell TCGplayer/eBay)
opportunities.description: Use your own tracker to find and exploit EU-US price gaps yourself. Rule-of-thumb from 2026 analyses: cross-border arbitrage clears fees only on cards worth roughly $150+; gaps >7% typically close within 48h. Fees: Cardmarket 5-8%, TCGplayer 10-15%, eBay ~13%. Needs starting capital and shipping logistics; the finding part is fully automatable, the shipping part is not.
opportunities.croatia_notes: EU-based buying on Cardmarket is your natural advantage (no import duties, cheap EU shipping). Selling to US adds customs paperwork.
first_steps: Add an arbitrage screener (gap % minus all fees) to your tracker
Paper-trade the signals for a month to measure real margins
Start with EUR 300-500 capital on 2-3 high-value cards

opportunities.name: MCP servers & Claude Code plugins/skills
opportunities.description: Publish MCP servers or Claude Code skills to the growing marketplaces (8,800+ listings; official marketplace has ~100 vetted plugins). Direct monetization is still weak in 2026 - most are free, money flows via hosted usage (Smithery) or the consulting/reputation they generate. Strategic play: a respected geo-MCP server (QGIS/GDAL/Earth Engine tools) positions you for the freelance work above.
opportunities.croatia_notes: No payout barriers since monetization is mostly indirect.
first_steps: Build an MCP server exposing GDAL/QGIS operations to Claude
Publish to Smithery + claudemarketplaces.com
Use it as the portfolio anchor for geo-automation freelancing

opportunities.name: Micro-SaaS
opportunities.description: A small subscription web app solving one niche problem. Reality check: ~70% of micro-SaaS earn under EUR 1,000 MRR and 54% of launched products earn zero; the median profitable one sits near EUR 4,000 MRR. AI cuts build time from months to days, which also means more competition. Highest ceiling outside a job, highest variance too.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Stripe available in Croatia; register pausalni obrt before charging.
first_steps: Validate demand before building (waitlist/landing page)
Build in a niche where you have unfair knowledge (geodesy, TCG)
Charge from day one; kill it fast if nobody pays

opportunities.name: Programmatic SEO / AI content sites + affiliate
opportunities.description: Generate thousands of data-backed pages and monetize with ads/affiliate. In 2026 this is the riskiest automated play: ~60% of projects fail, Google's scaled-content-abuse policy actively targets thin AI pages, and AI Overviews eat clicks. Works only with unique data per URL (e.g. your price histories). Treat as an add-on to a data product, not a standalone bet.
opportunities.croatia_notes: AdSense/affiliate networks pay to Croatia fine.
first_steps: Only do this over proprietary data (per-card price pages already exist in pokusaj)
Add genuine per-URL value (charts, history, alerts signup)
Measure indexation before scaling page count

opportunities.name: Geospatial ML competitions (Solafune, Kaggle, Zindi, SpaceNet, Copernicus Masters)
opportunities.description: Prize competitions on satellite/EO data: Solafune specializes in Sentinel-based tasks, Kaggle has a geospatial track, Copernicus Masters' prize pool exceeds EUR 1.5M, SpaceNet continues (SAR-optical registration in SpaceNet 9). Claude Code accelerates the engineering scaffold dramatically. Income is lottery-like, but even non-winning entries build the exact portfolio that unlocks the freelance/contract tiers above.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Copernicus Masters is EU-centric - being in Croatia/EU is an eligibility advantage for several ESA challenges.
first_steps: Enter one Solafune competition end-to-end for the workflow
Reuse the pipeline across competitions (they rhyme)
Publish solutions on GitHub as portfolio

opportunities.name: Trading bots / crypto agent economy (NOT recommended)
opportunities.description: Claude Code can absolutely build trading bots and there are 12+ live platforms where AI agents earn crypto for tasks. Included for completeness: retail algo trading is negative-expectation after fees for most people, agent-economy earnings are tiny and unstable, and capital risk is total. If you want automation income, every other 'automated' row dominates this one.
opportunities.croatia_notes: Crypto gains are taxable in Croatia (10% + surtax after holding rules) - paperwork even when losing money overall.
first_steps: Don't, or paper-trade only
If curious about the agent economy, read the platform list first
Cap any experiment at money you can lose entirely
